CONTENT.Career: Mendy is a youth product of Nice since the age of 10, and worked his way up their youth categories. He began his senior career with their reserves in 2021, and signed his first professional contract with the club on 29 September 2022. He made his professional and Ligue 1 with Nice as a late substitute in a 1–1 win over Auxerre on 16 October 2022.
CONTENT.Personal life: Born in France, Mendy is of Senegalese descent.

SUMMARY: Antoine Mendy (born 27 May 2004) is a French professional footballer who plays as a right-back for Nice.
